name: Phở & Bún Cô Lan
address: 142 Nguyễn Văn Thủ, Phường Đa Kao, Quận 1, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
hours_note: Hours from Google Maps. Kitchen closes when the broth pot runs out — usually before 2 PM.

reviews.author: Minh T.
reviews.text: The phở tái here has clear broth — not greasy. I come before 7 AM when the herbs are still crisp.

reviews.author: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Walked over from the hotel for bún thịt nướng. Cash only, no English menu, but the staff pointed at what we wanted.

reviews.author: Hoàng L.
reviews.text: Same family running this counter for years. Phở portion is generous for the price.

review_themes.name: Cà phê sữa đá
review_themes.note: Strong iced coffee after the bowl

owner_provided_notes: Neighborhood breakfast and lunch counter. Cash preferred.
headline: Morning phở on Nguyễn Văn Thủ
